content: We can adapt the streaming experience processing framework developed for ensuring consistent, high-quality Intensive Care Medicine (ICM) resident training to build a regulated quality-assurance layer for LLM-based AI agent development. This framework would stream real-time interaction data from deployed AI agents to a central quality governance layer, mirroring how it currently enables continuous monitoring and competency validation for ICM trainees.
source_topics: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
trigger_topic: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
